title: Accounting String Component Values
description: The details of an accounting string component.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the accounting string component value.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value of the accounting string component.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the accounting string component value.

component.title: Component
component.description: Accounting string component used in the accounting string.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Component.

subcomponents.title: Subcomponents
subcomponents.description: The subcomponents which are part of the component.

items.title: Subcomponents
items.description: The subcomponents which are part of the component.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Subcomponents.

determiningComponent.title: Determining Component
determiningComponent.description: The accounting string component identifying a relationship with a prerequisite domain component.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Determining Component.

relatedComponentDefaults.title: Related Component Defaults
relatedComponentDefaults.description: The default accounting string component values related to this component value

items.title: Related Component Defaults
items.description: The default accounting string component values related to this component value

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Related Component Defaults.

parentComponent.title: Parent Component
parentComponent.description: The accounting string component that is one level higher in the component hierarchy.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Parent Component.

transactionStatus.title: Transaction Status
transactionStatus.description: Indicates if accounting string component value is available for transaction entry.

oneOf.title: Account
oneOf.description: Type of account of the component.

account.title: Account
account.description: Type of account of the component.

oneOf.title: Fund
oneOf.description: Type of fund of account component.

fund.title: Fund
fund.description: Type of fund of the account component.

budgetPools.title: Budget Pools
budgetPools.description: The pool accounts associated with the accounting string component value by fiscal year.

fiscalYear.title: Fiscal Year
fiscalYear.description: The fiscal year associated with the budget pool.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Fiscal Year.

accountingComponent.title: Accounting Component
accountingComponent.description: The pool account associated with the accounting string component value.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Accounting Component.

effectiveStartOn.title: Effective Start On
effectiveStartOn.description: The first date and time that the version of the accounting string component value is effective.

effectiveEndOn.title: Effective End On
effectiveEndOn.description: The last date and time that the version of the accounting string component value is effective.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the accounting string component value (active or inactive).

grants.title: Grants
grants.description: The grant(s) associated with the accounting string component value.

items.title: Grants
items.description: The grant(s) associated with the accounting string component value.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Grants.
